title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Brooklyn Heights | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Brooklyn Heights, Brooklyn. Humane, effective solutions for historic homes and buildings. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Brooklyn Heights residents facing bat infestations need swift, humane solutions to protect their historic homes and families. Our expert bat removal and exclusion services safely eliminate bat colonies while preventing future entry into your brownstone, co-op, or residential property. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bat control tailored to the unique architecture of Brooklyn Heights buildings.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in bat removal for Brooklyn Heights' distinctive brownstones and landmark buildings, using humane exclusion methods that comply with NYC wildlife regulations. Our licensed technicians understand the structural vulnerabilities of historic properties and provide guaranteed solutions with minimal disruption to your home.
localContext: Brooklyn Heights' 19th-century brownstones and vintage apartment buildings feature architectural details like cornices, roof gaps, and chimney spaces that commonly attract roosting bats. The neighborhood's proximity to Brooklyn Bridge Park and the East River waterfront creates an ideal habitat for bat populations seeking shelter in residential structures.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Brooklyn Heights?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Brooklyn Heights typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and the complexity of your building's architecture. Historic brownstones may require specialized exclusion techniques that affect pricing. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in Brooklyn Heights?
faqs.answer: Yes, but it must be done humanely and in compliance with NYC and New York State wildlife protection laws. Bats cannot be harmed or killed during removal. We use one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but prevent re-entry, typically performed outside of maternity season (June-July) when flightless pups are present.

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my Brooklyn Heights home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, bat droppings (guano) in attics or near entry points, grease marks around small openings, strong ammonia odors, and sightings of bats entering or exiting your building at twilight. Brownstone residents often notice activity around cornices, roof eaves, and behind shutters.

faqs.question: How long does bat exclusion take in Brooklyn Heights?
faqs.answer: The complete bat exclusion process typically takes 2-4 weeks. After the initial inspection and sealing of entry points with one-way devices, we monitor for 7-14 days to ensure all bats have exited. Once confirmed, we permanently seal all openings and perform cleanup and sanitation. Historic buildings may require additional time for careful restoration of sealed areas.
